title: GWHOLE Wasp Nest Decoy,4 Pack Wasp Trap Fake Nest Yellow Jackets Bee Repellent Deterrent for Garden Outdoor Hanging
bullet_points: Our wasp nest decoy helps to prevent wasps, hornets, and yellow jackets from building new nests within a 200 ft area, ensuring you live in peace without disturbance of hornet.
Comes with 4 wasp deterrent nests in 8.7*11”, which simulate the real look of an hive in size, shape, and color to deter wasps at most.
Made of durable paper, eco-friendly, non toxic, not harmful to you and your kids like chemical pest control spray, foam and pesticide.
Easy to hang under your deck, shed, branch, and the eave of your roof or any other location you might find a real nest. Make sure any existing nest has been fully removed before hanging.
We recommend to use in outdoor dining area, camping spot, lawn, garden, orchard, garbage can or any place possible to attract wasps.
